name: load_restore_reset_semantics_finalization

stateIO: Locked applySnapshot UI semantics around preserve/snapshot/reset
Declared managed UI subtree set: debtorPanel, monitoring, report
Finalized reset helpers for preserve-ui reset and full reset
cloudState: Cloud apply now uses explicit uiPolicy=preserve and load:cloud reason
local: Local restore now uses explicit uiPolicy=snapshot and restore:localBackup reason
Local save messaging clarifies save semantics without changing file format
auth: Logout/reset entry now prefers full reset semantics through stateIO.resetAll

notes: Backup format and validator policy intentionally unchanged.
Renderer lifecycle and direct-render boundaries intentionally unchanged in this stage.
